modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: No reply to thread button in D2L discussions.

full_description_text:  
No puedo ver el botón para responder en los hilos.  
Quiero contestar los posts de discusión.  
No sé por qué falta el botón.
